sections.paragraph:
Original: זג

Transliteration: zâg

Phonetic: zawg

BDB Definition:

  1. (meaning uncertain)
    1. name of some insignificant product of the vine, forbidden to Nazarites, perhaps the stem or skin of the grape

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to inclose

TWOT entry: 527a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
